name: Gym Booker Cron
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '*/5 * * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  book:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Trigger booking bot
        run: |
          curl -X GET "${{ secrets.APP_URL }}/api/cron" \
          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.CRON_SECRET }}"
